metadata.documentation: Amazon CloudFront KeyValueStore Service to View and Update Data in a KVS Resource

DeleteKey.documentation: Deletes the key value pair specified by the key.

returnType.documentation: Metadata information about a Key Value Store.

DescribeKeyValueStore.documentation: Returns metadata information about Key Value Store.

returnType.documentation: Metadata information about a Key Value Store.

ListKeys.documentation: Returns a list of key value pairs.

PutKey.documentation: Creates a new key value pair or replaces the value of an existing key.

returnType.documentation: Metadata information about a Key Value Store.

UpdateKeys.documentation: Puts or Deletes multiple key value pairs in a single, all-or-nothing operation.

returnType.documentation: Metadata information about a Key Value Store.
